developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts, and we appreciate your honesty—even if it's not the experience we were hoping for.

We understand why some players might see similarities to other games, but we've been working hard to carve out our own identity. Our focus is on building a unique experience centered around a deep pet system, which includes pet synthesis, skill-based battles, and meaningful progression—features that are becoming the heart of our game and something we believe sets us apart.

We're constantly improving based on feedback like yours, and we'd genuinely love for you to give the game another chance, especially as we roll out more of our unique systems in the coming updates. If there are specific things you'd like to see improved or changed, we're all ears in our Discord community.

Thanks again for being honest. We hope you'll check back in and see how the game continues to evolve.

developer_response.body:
Hey rizzlersizzler, thanks for being real and dropping your thoughts, even if they're super frustrated right now. We hear you, and honestly, we take this seriously.

We know the egg grind can feel long sometimes—we're actually tweaking some of the drop rates and mission rewards in the next patch to make things feel more rewarding, sooner. And about the "bubbles" (we're guessing you mean the upgrade/boost items?), we're committed to keeping the core gameplay skill-based. Nothing you can buy should ever feel like a must-have to compete. If something comes off that way, it's a bug in our balance, not the intention, and we'll look into it.

As for originality—that's a tough one, and we get it. A lot of games share similar ideas these days, but we're really trying to build something with its own vibe, mechanics, and soul. We're still early, and a lot of what makes a game feel unique comes from the community and the updates we build with you all. In the future, we will focus more on pet system, pet battle, and pet command.

If you ever feel like giving it another shot or just wanna yell at us some more with specifics, our Discord is open. No corporate bots, just real people trying to make a fun game.

Either way, thanks for speaking up. It helps more than you might think.

developer_response.body:
We're sincerely sorry for the issue with your Jump Start Pack purchase. We discovered this add-on bug today. Some of our players report this bug to our Discord channel.  And we are currently working on an emergency fix.

An update will be released later today. Once you update the game, you should receive your purchased items. To apologize for the inconvenience, we will also provide compensation to you and other affected players.

We appreciate your patience and hope you can give us another chance.

reviews.review_description: I've been playing since the early testing phase, and the coolest thing is the wacky effects of various props . developer_response.body:
Hello,
We sincerely apologize for the issue with your missing egg. We can help you recover it.
To process a replacement and provide compensation, please contact us through one of the following ways:
Email: Send the details to contact@vrsuplife.com.
Discord: Submit a report in our official Discord server's #lost-and-found channel.
In your message, please include your Meta username so we can locate your account and verify the issue. We will send the replacement and compensation directly to the account associated with that username.
If you do not receive it after we process it, please reach out to us again using the methods above.
Again, we're very sorry for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Latest Reply (Feb 9):
Hello,

Good news! We have verified your report and have issued the replacement for your missing items along with compensation Gold directly to your in-game account.

How to Claim:
- Head to the statue beneath the Golden Tree.
- Look for the Reward Stone on the ground in front of the statue and grab it to receive your items.

Important Warning (Please Read):
Due to the ongoing bug, eggs may disappear if not hatched immediately. Therefore, we strongly advise that you prepare the required Ores in advance and hatch any eggs you receive right away to prevent them from being lost again.

Our development team is actively working on an emergency fix for this issue. We will send another notification to the community once the fix is deployed.

Thank you for your patience.
